title: Preschool Principal (International Preschool) - Up to $5,500 - Loyang
description:
• Position : Preschool Principal (International Preschool) - Up to $5,500 - Loyang
  • Location : East - Loyang
  • Working hours : Monday to Friday | 8am to 5pm OR 9am to 6pm
  • Salary (commensurate with experience) : Up to $5,500 + up to 3 Months Performance Bonus + 14 Annual Leaves + Birthday Leave + Medical Benefits & Coverage Up to $600 per year
  • Industry : Preschool Education 

Main Responsibilities:

  • Foster a warm and positive, people-oriented, culture in the centre that is visible to the team, children and parents.
  • Strong ownership over the centre and essentially the go-to person for all stakeholders and matters relating to the centre, with an unrelenting emphasis on safety.
  • Drive the design of inspiring environments and encourage an openness that stimulates teachers' and children’s interest in inquiry and learning.
  • Work closely with teaching and support staff and back each other up as a team when needed.
  • Maintain warm relations with parents to foster tight home-school partnership.
  • Be the face of the centre and to chip in on marketing, enrolment and staff recruitment matters.
  • Proactive, willing to roll up sleeves, get hands dirtied and to devote copious amounts of time on the ground.

Requirements:

  • Educational qualifications recognised by the Singapore Early Childhood Development Agency (ECDA) for registration as a Centre Principal.
  • Genuine passion and patience with children and someone who see this as more than a job.
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills.

Email to: chloe@searchpersonnel.com.sg

Do visit www.facebook.com/search.personnel for more job listings.

***We do not charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract.***

Chloe Ong

Associate Consulting Director (APAC)

Reg no.: R22105510

EA No: 13C6684
